§6Particle Accelerator: Products§f

§aThe exotic particles that the accelerator unlocks — antimatter, antischrabidium, higgs bosons, and more!§f

Each recipe uses the Particle Accelerator with a Particle Detector at the receiving end. Particles need §b0 defocus§f to be accepted.

§6Standard Recipes§f:
§b• Chicken Nugget§f — Raw Chicken ×2
§b• Antimatter Capsule§f — Hydrogen Ion + Copper Ion (§e300§f score) — contains 1000 mB antimatter
§b• Antischrabidium Capsule§f — Antimatter Capsule ×2 (§e400§f score) — contains 1000 mB antischrabidium
§b• Muon Capsule§f — Antimatter + Hydrogen Ion (§e2,500§f score) — used in further recipes
§b• Tachyon Capsule§f — Higgs Boson + Muon (§e5,000§f score) — used for murky wings

§6Exotic Particles§f:
§b• Higgs Boson Capsule§f — Lead Ion + Hydrogen Ion (§e6,500§f score) — transmutes U-238 to schrabidium in the Exposure Chamber
§b• Dark Matter Capsule§f — Antischrabidium ×2 (§e10,000§f score) — transmutes plutonium to euphemium in Exposure Chamber
§b• Strange Quark Capsule§f — Dark Matter + Muon (§e12,500§f score) — makes the Dark Crystal
§b• Sparkticle Capsule§f — Pulverized Enchantment + Strange Quark (§e12,500§f score) — makes dineutronium from ferric schrabidate (+ dust waste)

§6Ultimate Particle§f:
§b• The Digamma Particle§f — Higgs Boson + Sparkticle (§e70,000§f score) — used for Digamma RBMK fuel; outputs empty capsule

§eTip§f: Accelerator recipes require a §escore§f threshold — build a long enough ring with appropriate coils to achieve the required particle momentum. The Digamma recipe requires 70,000 score, so you need a massive ring with high-tier coils (Chlorophyte recommended)!
